feature_tested: Engineering Department Dashboard, Calendar Sync-Simulation, Commissary Real Weather API, Pastry Commissary Configs, Admin Ops Weekly Digest, Access Request Approvals
summary: All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Engineering Ops panel loads with correct KPIs (7 Open, 1 Critical, 10 Equipment), sidebar z-index 99901 remains above panels, and real OpenWeather API integration working (clear sky 76.1°F).

endpoints: POST /api/calendar/sync-simulation - Syncs simulation events (63 total events, 12 outlets)
GET /api/calendar/events?start_date=2026-03-01&end_date=2026-04-30 - Returns 36 events (18 simulation BEO events)
GET /api/calendar/outlets - Returns 12 outlets including simulation outlets
POST /api/commissary/forecast-production - Real OpenWeather API: clear sky 76.1°F, weather_factor 1.05, moon_phase waning_crescent (-2.0%)
GET /api/commissary/configs - Returns 4 Pastry configs (Central Kitchen → Aqua Café, Grand Dining Room, Crystal Ballroom, SkyBar Lounge)
GET /api/engineering/dashboard - Returns 6 total WOs (6 open, 1 critical), 10 equipment
GET /api/engineering/equipment - Returns 10 items across 6 categories (refrigeration, kitchen, hvac, pool, elevator, fire_safety)
GET /api/engineering/work-orders - Returns 7 total (7 open, 0 in_progress, 0 completed)
POST /api/admin-ops/weekly-digest - This week $54,237.44 vs Last week $52,864.83 (+2.6%), AI narrative generated
POST /api/admin-ops/access-requests/decide - Approves/denies requests and updates RBAC

verified_elements: Sidebar visible with z-index 99901 (above panels at 20010)
Dashboard panel shows correct data (Revenue $279,009.47, Labor 83.5%)
Weather shows real data: 75°F Partly Cloudy
Engineering Ops button visible in sidebar under ENTERPRISE & COMPLIANCE
KPIs: Open 7, In Progress 0, Critical 1, Completed 0, Equipment 10
Tabs: Overview, Work Orders (7), Equipment (10), PM Schedule (10 due), New Work Order
Recent Work Orders list shows Room 305, Crystal Ballroom, Pool Deck, Room 412
PM Due Soon shows 10 items (refrigeration, kitchen, hvac, pool, elevator)
Work order priorities displayed (HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)
Sidebar remains visible when Engineering panel is open

critical_code_review_comments: Engineering dashboard correctly shows 7 work orders (5 seeded + 2 test-created)
Real OpenWeather API integration working - returns actual weather data (clear sky 76.1°F) not simulated
Moon phase calculation working (waning_crescent with -2.0% impact factor)
Pastry commissary configured for all 4 F&B outlets (Central Kitchen as producer)
Calendar sync-simulation correctly syncs 18 simulation BEO events from events collection
Sidebar z-index 99901 correctly stays above panel windows (z-index 20010)
Work order creation automatically generates notification for assigned team
test_credentials: No auth required. Engineering seeded with POST /api/engineering/seed
seed_data_creation: Engineering: 10 equipment items, 5 work orders (Walk-in cooler temp alarm critical, Dishwasher drain high, Guest room AC high, Pool pump PM medium, Ballroom lighting low)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 65 features working correctly. Engineering department fully functional with dashboard, equipment registry, PM schedules, and work order management. Calendar sync-simulation syncs 18 BEO events from simulation. Commissary uses real OpenWeather API (OPENWEATHER_API_KEY in backend/.env). Pastry commissary configured for 4 outlets. Weekly digest generates AI narrative via Emergent LLM Key. Sidebar z-index 99901 keeps it above panels.

mocked_apis.OpenWeather: REAL API - returns actual weather data (clear sky 76.1°F)
